description: Student submitted a DMIST that covers D, M, I, and S but omits any transport or disposition content — no 'transporting', 'hospital', 'ETA', 'ED', or similar T-section keywords. The narrative is complete. Tests that the DMIST structural ceiling fires for the missing T component and produces ceiling=8 (10 - 1*2 = 8), while leaving the narrative ceiling clean.

o2_nrb.label: High-flow O2 via NRB mask (15 LPM)

submitted_docs.dmist: D: 8yo male, difficulty breathing. M: History of asthma, no known allergies. I: Applied O2 via NRB 15 LPM, albuterol SVN, positioned upright. S: SpO2 83%, HR 134, improving after treatment.
submitted_docs.narrative: C: Dispatched to 8-year-old male presenting with asthma exacerbation. H: 2-hour onset of wheezing, history of asthma. A: SpO2 83%, HR 134. R: O2 NRB, albuterol SVN, positioned upright. T: ALS intercept called, transporting to Pediatric ED.

critical_actions.description: Administer high-flow O2 via NRB mask

_note: dmist_ceiling=8 because T section is absent (10 - 1*2 = 8). The DMIST has D, M, I, S all present but omits any transport/disposition/ETA language. The ceiling is prompt-guided (enforce=False). Narrative is fully structured so no CHART-based ceiling applies.
